case_title: ROBERT JOHNSON VS. BENNY BOUSKILA et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT TODAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE BY CO-DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE RETAINED ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSKILA, BENNY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUSKILA, BENNY DAYAN, NURIT $3,040.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,150.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S MOTORCYCLE IS A TOTAL LOSS; THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR ITS VALUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSKILA, BENNY DAYAN, NURIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
